use_cases: Hero section headings with dynamic hover reveals
Landing page typography with interactive gradients
Logo or brand name animations on hover
Navigation menu items with cursor-tracking reveals
ai_summary: An interactive text effect component that creates a dynamic radial gradient mask following the cursor on hover. The effect reveals a vibrant multi-color gradient (yellow, red, green, cyan, purple) within the text as users move their mouse, making it ideal for creating engaging hero sections, landing pages, and interactive typography showcases in modern web applications.
